since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.82% · BTC -2.50% · Gold -2.25% · Nasdaq100 -0.68%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.98%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.67%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.67%, ANET +5.36%, AVGO +5.05%, BIDU +4.75%, SMCI +2.17%. Laggards: PANW -5.83%, ZS -4.28%, UPST -4.17%, PLTR -4.13%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.31% at $149.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
